prompt: Task 129 tests detected 12 Magic Number smells and 1 Assertion Roulette smell by JNose.
JaCoCo branch coverage is clean for Claude implementation.
Refactor tests to fix Magic Number smell by extracting all numeric literals into private static final constants.

response: Extracted all numeric literals and list inputs into private static final constants prefixed with CL_ to avoid naming conflicts with Gemini constants.
Split all multi-assertion test methods into individual single-assertion tests to fix Assertion Roulette smell.
Each assertEquals includes a descriptive failure message.
Added edge case tests for single element lists (positive, negative, zero) and contiguous subarray scenarios.
interactions.notes: Magic Number (12) and Assertion Roulette (1) smells resolved. JaCoCo branch coverage was already clean, no additional coverage changes needed.
